meta.title: Pokemon Odyssey Team Planner
generatedFrom: Level Cap, Boss, Miniboss, Sea Map, Sidequests (v4.1.1).xlsx
sourceNotes: Availability uses the earliest parsed direct encounter for the Pokemon or its evolution family.
Guide availability tags come from the teambuilding PDF and may override encounter timing when earlier.
Exact story/boss details are kept in source records but summarized in the UI by default.
Ability tooltips use Odyssey's new/buffed ability sheet first, with standard ability text cached from PokeAPI.
Etrian Variant portrait art uses NORMAL embedded workbook sprites when a matching Pokemon exists.

guideEntries.howToObtain: Either get a Vulpix from Talrega 's wonder trade or catch it in the Third Stratum and use a Fire Stone.
Catch a Sunkern in the First Stratum and use a Sun Stone.
Catch it in the Third Stratum .
Catch a Poliwag in Seaside Grotto , evolve it into Poliwhirl and use a Link Stone or catch the F.O.E. version in the Fourth Stratum .
Catch a Wingull in Coastal Road and evolve it into Pelipper.
Catch a Wailmer and evolve it into Wailord.
Catch it in Jagged Mountain or as a static encounter in Varley Woods.
Catch it in the left half of the Second Stratum by breaking rocks.
Catch a Larvitar in the right half of the Second Stratum and evolve it into Tyranitar.
Catch a Snorunt in Arundel Woods and evolve it into Glalie.
Catch an Eevee in Talrega Farm and interact with the Icy Stone in Arundel Woods .
Catch a Seel in Arundel Woods and evolve it into Dewgong.
Either get a Bulbasaur from Talrega 's wonder trade or from Saya's quest in Coastal Road .

abilityDefinitions.name: Abyss Boost
abilityDefinitions.effect: Raises the user's best stat after it KOs an opponent.

abilityDefinitions.name: Abyss Grace
abilityDefinitions.effect: Raises the team's accuracy by 10% while it's battling.

abilityDefinitions.name: Adaptability
abilityDefinitions.effect: Increases the same-type attack bonus from 1.5× to 2×.

abilityDefinitions.name: Arcanist
abilityDefinitions.effect: Boosts Psychic-type moves by 20%

abilityDefinitions.name: Arena Trap
abilityDefinitions.effect: Prevents opponents from fleeing or switching out. Eluded by Flying-types and Pokémon in the air.

abilityDefinitions.name: Battle Armor
abilityDefinitions.effect: Protects against critical hits.

abilityDefinitions.name: Blaze
abilityDefinitions.effect: Strengthens Fire moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.

abilityDefinitions.name: Botanist
abilityDefinitions.effect: "Herb" and "Potion" moves gain +1 priority.

abilityDefinitions.name: Chlorophyll
abilityDefinitions.effect: Doubles Speed during strong sunlight.

abilityDefinitions.name: Clear Body
abilityDefinitions.effect: Prevents stats from being lowered by other Pokémon.

abilityDefinitions.name: Cloud Nine
abilityDefinitions.effect: Negates all effects of weather, but does not prevent the weather itself.

abilityDefinitions.name: Color Change
abilityDefinitions.effect: Changes type to match when hit by a damaging move.

abilityDefinitions.name: Competitive
abilityDefinitions.effect: Raises Special Attack by two stages upon having any stat lowered.

abilityDefinitions.name: Compoundeyes
abilityDefinitions.effect: Increases moves' accuracy to 1.3×.

abilityDefinitions.name: Defiant
abilityDefinitions.effect: Raises Attack two stages upon having any stat lowered.

abilityDefinitions.name: Dragon Fruit
abilityDefinitions.effect: Boosts Dragon-type moves by 50%

abilityDefinitions.name: Drizzle
abilityDefinitions.effect: Summons rain that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.

abilityDefinitions.name: Drought
abilityDefinitions.effect: Summons strong sunlight that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.

abilityDefinitions.name: Early Bird
abilityDefinitions.effect: Makes sleep pass twice as quickly.

abilityDefinitions.name: Eerie Aura
abilityDefinitions.effect: Boosts Ghost-type moves by 20%.

abilityDefinitions.name: Effect Spore
abilityDefinitions.effect: Has a 30% chance of inflcting either paralysis, poison, or sleep on attacking Pokémon on contact.

abilityDefinitions.name: Fafnir
abilityDefinitions.effect: Boosts Electric and Dragon-type moves by 20%

abilityDefinitions.name: Filter
abilityDefinitions.effect: Decreases damage taken from super-effective moves by 1/4.

abilityDefinitions.name: Flame Body
abilityDefinitions.effect: Has a 30% chance of burning attacking Pokémon on contact.

abilityDefinitions.name: Flare Boost
abilityDefinitions.effect: Increases Special Attack to 1.5× when burned.

abilityDefinitions.name: Flash Fire
abilityDefinitions.effect: Protects against Fire moves. Once one has been blocked, the Pokémon's own Fire moves inflict 1.5× damage until it leaves battle.

abilityDefinitions.name: Forecast
abilityDefinitions.effect: Changes Castform's type and form to match the weather.

abilityDefinitions.name: Fur Coat
abilityDefinitions.effect: Halves damage from physical attacks.

abilityDefinitions.name: Gale Wings
abilityDefinitions.effect: Raises Flying moves' priority by one stage.

abilityDefinitions.name: Gluttony
abilityDefinitions.effect: Makes the Pokémon eat any held Berry triggered by low HP below 1/2 its max HP.

abilityDefinitions.name: Guts
abilityDefinitions.effect: Increases Attack to 1.5× with a major status ailment.

abilityDefinitions.name: Huge Power
abilityDefinitions.effect: Doubles Attack in battle.

abilityDefinitions.name: Hustle
abilityDefinitions.effect: Strengthens physical moves to inflict 1.5× damage, but decreases their accuracy to 0.8×.

abilityDefinitions.name: Hyper Cutter
abilityDefinitions.effect: Prevents Attack from being lowered by other Pokémon.

abilityDefinitions.name: Illuminate
abilityDefinitions.effect: Doubles the wild encounter rate.

abilityDefinitions.name: Immunity
abilityDefinitions.effect: Prevents poison.

abilityDefinitions.name: Inner Focus
abilityDefinitions.effect: Prevents flinching.

abilityDefinitions.name: Insomnia
abilityDefinitions.effect: Prevents sleep.

abilityDefinitions.name: Intense Care
abilityDefinitions.effect: Healing moves gain +1 priority.

abilityDefinitions.name: Intimidate
abilityDefinitions.effect: Lowers opponents' Attack one stage upon entering battle.

abilityDefinitions.name: Jungle King
abilityDefinitions.effect: Boosts Ground and Fighting-type moves by 50%

abilityDefinitions.name: Keen Eye
abilityDefinitions.effect: Prevents accuracy from being lowered.

abilityDefinitions.name: Keen Eyes
abilityDefinitions.effect: Prevents accuracy from being lowered.

abilityDefinitions.name: Levitate
abilityDefinitions.effect: Evades Ground moves.

abilityDefinitions.name: Lightningrod
abilityDefinitions.effect: Redirects single-target Electric moves to this Pokémon where possible. Absorbs Electric moves, raising Special Attack one stage.

abilityDefinitions.name: Limber
abilityDefinitions.effect: Prevents paralysis.

abilityDefinitions.name: Liquid Ooze
abilityDefinitions.effect: Damages opponents using leeching moves for as much as they would heal.

abilityDefinitions.name: Magma Armor
abilityDefinitions.effect: Prevents freezing.

abilityDefinitions.name: Magnet Pull
abilityDefinitions.effect: Prevents Steel opponents from fleeing or switching out.

abilityDefinitions.name: Marvel Scale
abilityDefinitions.effect: Increases Defense to 1.5× with a major status ailment.

abilityDefinitions.name: Minus
abilityDefinitions.effect: Increases Special Attack to 1.5× when a friendly Pokémon has Plus or Minus.

abilityDefinitions.name: Moxie
abilityDefinitions.effect: Raises Attack one stage upon KOing a Pokémon.

abilityDefinitions.name: Multiscale
abilityDefinitions.effect: Halves damage taken from full HP.

abilityDefinitions.name: Natural Cure
abilityDefinitions.effect: Cures any major status ailment upon switching out.

abilityDefinitions.name: No Guard
abilityDefinitions.effect: Ensures all moves used by and against the Pokémon hit.

abilityDefinitions.name: Oblivious
abilityDefinitions.effect: Prevents infatuation and protects against Captivate.

abilityDefinitions.name: Omni-Chase
abilityDefinitions.effect: 50% Speed up during weather.

abilityDefinitions.name: Omnihunter
abilityDefinitions.effect: Boosts Flying-type moves by 50%

abilityDefinitions.name: Overgrow
abilityDefinitions.effect: Strengthens Grass moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.

abilityDefinitions.name: Own Tempo
abilityDefinitions.effect: Prevents confusion.

abilityDefinitions.name: Pickup
abilityDefinitions.effect: Picks up other Pokémon's used and Flung held items. May also pick up an item after battle.

abilityDefinitions.name: Plus
abilityDefinitions.effect: Increases Special Attack to 1.5× when a friendly Pokémon has Plus or Minus.

abilityDefinitions.name: Poison Point
abilityDefinitions.effect: Has a 30% chance of poisoning attacking Pokémon on contact.

abilityDefinitions.name: Prankster
abilityDefinitions.effect: Raises non-damaging moves' priority by one stage.

abilityDefinitions.name: Pressure
abilityDefinitions.effect: Increases the PP cost of moves targetting the Pokémon by one.

abilityDefinitions.name: Prism Lens
abilityDefinitions.effect: Boosts Psychic-type moves by 50%.

abilityDefinitions.name: Protean
abilityDefinitions.effect: Changes the bearer's type to match each move it uses.

abilityDefinitions.name: Pure Power
abilityDefinitions.effect: Doubles Attack in battle.

abilityDefinitions.name: Radiance
abilityDefinitions.effect: Normal-type moves become Aether type and get a 30% damage boost.

abilityDefinitions.name: Rain Dish
abilityDefinitions.effect: Heals for 1/16 max HP after each turn during rain.

abilityDefinitions.name: Rock Head
abilityDefinitions.effect: Protects against recoil damage.

abilityDefinitions.name: Rough Skin
abilityDefinitions.effect: Damages attacking Pokémon for 1/8 their max HP on contact.

abilityDefinitions.name: Sand Rush
abilityDefinitions.effect: Doubles Speed during a sandstorm. Protects against sandstorm damage.

abilityDefinitions.name: Sand Stream
abilityDefinitions.effect: Summons a sandstorm that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.

abilityDefinitions.name: Sand Veil
abilityDefinitions.effect: Increases evasion to 1.25× during a sandstorm. Protects against sandstorm damage.

abilityDefinitions.name: Scrappy
abilityDefinitions.effect: Lets the Pokémon's Normal and Fighting moves hit Ghost Pokémon.

abilityDefinitions.name: Serene Grace
abilityDefinitions.effect: Doubles the chance of moves' extra effects occurring.

abilityDefinitions.name: Shadow Tag
abilityDefinitions.effect: Prevents opponents from fleeing or switching out.

abilityDefinitions.name: Shed Skin
abilityDefinitions.effect: Has a 33% chance of curing any major status ailment after each turn.

abilityDefinitions.name: Shell Armor
abilityDefinitions.effect: Protects against critical hits.

abilityDefinitions.name: Shield Dust
abilityDefinitions.effect: Protects against incoming moves' extra effects.

abilityDefinitions.name: Singularity
abilityDefinitions.effect: Boosts Fire and Ice-type moves by 25%

abilityDefinitions.name: Skill Link
abilityDefinitions.effect: Extends two-to-five-hit moves and Triple Kick to their full length every time.

abilityDefinitions.name: Slush Rush
abilityDefinitions.effect: During Hail, this Pokémon has double Speed.

abilityDefinitions.name: Sniper
abilityDefinitions.effect: Strengthens critical hits to inflict 3× damage rather than 2×.

abilityDefinitions.name: Snow Cloak
abilityDefinitions.effect: Increases evasion to 1.25× during hail. Protects against hail damage.

abilityDefinitions.name: Snow Warning
abilityDefinitions.effect: Summons hail that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.

abilityDefinitions.name: Solid Rock
abilityDefinitions.effect: Decreases damage taken from super-effective moves by 1/4.

abilityDefinitions.name: Soundproof
abilityDefinitions.effect: Protects against sound-based moves.

abilityDefinitions.name: Sovereignty
abilityDefinitions.effect: "Order" moves gain +1 priority.

abilityDefinitions.name: Speed Boost
abilityDefinitions.effect: Raises Speed one stage after each turn.

abilityDefinitions.name: Static
abilityDefinitions.effect: Has a 30% chance of paralyzing attacking Pokémon on contact.

abilityDefinitions.name: Sticky Hold
abilityDefinitions.effect: Prevents a held item from being removed by other Pokémon.

abilityDefinitions.name: Sturdy
abilityDefinitions.effect: The user gains the "Endure" effect as long as it's full HP at the beginning of the turn.

abilityDefinitions.name: Super Luck
abilityDefinitions.effect: Raises moves' critical hit rates one stage.

abilityDefinitions.name: Swarm
abilityDefinitions.effect: Strengthens Bug moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.

abilityDefinitions.name: Swift Swim
abilityDefinitions.effect: Doubles Speed during rain.

abilityDefinitions.name: Synchronize
abilityDefinitions.effect: Copies burns, paralysis, and poison received onto the Pokémon that inflicted them.

abilityDefinitions.name: Technician
abilityDefinitions.effect: Strengthens moves of 60 base power or less to 1.5× their power.

abilityDefinitions.name: Thick Fat
abilityDefinitions.effect: Halves damage from Fire and Ice moves.

abilityDefinitions.name: Tinted Lens
abilityDefinitions.effect: Doubles damage inflicted with not-very-effective moves.

abilityDefinitions.name: Torrent
abilityDefinitions.effect: Strengthens Water moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.

abilityDefinitions.name: Toxic Boost
abilityDefinitions.effect: Increases Attack to 1.5× when poisoned.

abilityDefinitions.name: Trace
abilityDefinitions.effect: Copies an opponent's ability upon entering battle.

abilityDefinitions.name: Unaware
abilityDefinitions.effect: Ignores other Pokémon's stat modifiers for damage and accuracy calculation.

abilityDefinitions.name: Unburden
abilityDefinitions.effect: Doubles Speed upon using or losing a held item.

abilityDefinitions.name: Venom Blood
abilityDefinitions.effect: Boosts Poison-type moves by 50%.

abilityDefinitions.name: Vital Spirit
abilityDefinitions.effect: Prevents sleep.

abilityDefinitions.name: Volt Absorb
abilityDefinitions.effect: Absorbs Electric moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.

abilityDefinitions.name: Water Absorb
abilityDefinitions.effect: Absorbs Water moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.

abilityDefinitions.name: White Smoke
abilityDefinitions.effect: Prevents stats from being lowered by other Pokémon.

abilityDefinitions.name: Wonder Guard
abilityDefinitions.effect: Protects against damaging moves that are not super effective.

abilityDefinitions.name: Wonder Skin
abilityDefinitions.effect: Lowers incoming non-damaging moves' base accuracy to exactly 50%.

levelCaps.stratum: Second Stratum: Sand Sea of Golgonda

sidequests.name: Talk to me!
sidequests.description: Talk to the elder next to the Adventurers Guild

sidequests.name: The Island of Varley
sidequests.description: Find a new sea route to Varley through Naval Explorations

sidequests.name: The Island of Arundel
sidequests.description: Find a new sea route to Arundel through Naval Explorations

sidequests.name: The Island of Charon
sidequests.description: Find a new sea route to Charon through Naval Explorations

sidequests.name: The Island of Gorenil
sidequests.description: Find a new sea route to Gorenil through Naval Explorations

sidequests.name: Shop LV.2
sidequests.description: Bring 5 Red Flowers and 3 Emerald to Rikkah.

sidequests.name: Shop LV.3
sidequests.description: Bring 7 Yellow Flowers and 4 Topaz to Rikkah.

sidequests.name: Shop LV.4
sidequests.description: Bring 6 Blue and Purple Flowers, 3 Sapphire and Dolomite to Rikkah.

sidequests.name: Saya's Research 1
sidequests.description: Show a regional Gulpin to Saya.
sidequests.reward: Either Bulbasaur, Charmander or Squirtle at LV.5

sidequests.name: Saya's Research 2
sidequests.description: Show a regional Corsola to Saya.
sidequests.reward: Either Chikorita, Cyndaquil or Totodile at LV.15

sidequests.name: Saya's Research 3
sidequests.description: Show a regional Xatu to Saya.
sidequests.reward: Either Treecko, Torchic or Mudkip at LV.25

sidequests.name: Your Compendium...
sidequests.description: Catch 40 Pokémon and show your Compendium to the scientist.

sidequests.name: I want a Shroomish!
sidequests.description: Find a Shroomish for the child at the Guild of Talrega.

sidequests.name: The magic potion
sidequests.description: Find the Talisman lost by the girl on Arundel.

sidequests.name: I want a Ralts!
sidequests.description: Find a Ralts for the boy on Charon.

sidequests.name: The perfect gift
sidequests.description: Bring 3 Red Flower, 3 Yellow Flowers and 3 Topaz to the Boy at the Gorge of Zanado.

sidequests.name: One drink too many...
sidequests.location: Muu Muu Café - Island of Charon (Daig)
sidequests.description: Help Daig calm his friends down at the Brigit Farm.

sidequests.name: The love potion
sidequests.description: Bring 4 Red Flowers and 4 Yellow Flowers to the Girl at the Krabby Club.

sidequests.name: The Old Amber
sidequests.description: Recover the Amber from the sandy caves of the Second Stratum.

sidequests.name: Find Yanma
sidequests.description: Trade Yanma to the boy at the Krabby Club.

sidequests.name: Show me a Sneasel!
sidequests.description: Show a Sneasel to the boy at the Krabby Club.

sidequests.name: The cake is a lie
sidequests.description: Bring 10 Oran Berries, 5 Pecha Berries and 5 Chesto Berries to the girl at the Krabby Club.

sidequests.name: How to tame a boar...
sidequests.location: Krabby Club - Coastal Road (Teo, the shady-looking guy)
sidequests.description: Fight against Teo in Fibernia Woods.

sidequests.name: Eeveelution!
sidequests.description: Show Vaporeon, Jolteon and Flareon to the Woman at the base camp.

sidequests.name: The Red Bell
sidequests.description: Make sure the Third Stratum boy is okay.

sidequests.name: The lost Castform
sidequests.description: Find the lost Castform in Auburn Thicket.

sidequests.name: Where's my child?
sidequests.description: Find the lost child in the Azure Cave of the Fourth Stratum.
sidequests.reward: Magna Vis (Key Item, basically HM Strength)

sidequests.name: My poor Chansey
sidequests.description: Find the lost Chansey in the Fourth Stratum.

sidequests.name: I hate pirates!
sidequests.description: Recover the goods stolen by the pirates of Pirate Island.

sidequests.name: The Renegade
sidequests.description: Solve the mystery of the Jagged Mountain.
sidequests.reward: Memento Vitae (Key Item, it's a move reminder)

sidequests.name: The Mantis' Nest
sidequests.description: Defeat Kabutops F.O.E. in the First Stratum.

sidequests.name: Napier's Requests
sidequests.description: Help Jenetta and Napier in their quest to recover the stolen treasures.
sidequests.reward: Master Ball, 200.000 Poké, Aqua Resort's penthouse

sidequests.name: A Fanatic's Demand
sidequests.description: Find a Beldum for the boy at the Aqua Resort.

sidequests.name: The wounded Lapras
sidequests.description: Treat the wounded Lapras.

sidequests.name: Holy Cow!
sidequests.description: Trade Miltank to the boy at Talerga's Farm.

sidequests.name: From the abyss...
sidequests.description: Find the Ace Trainer's boyfriend in the Sixth Stratum.

sidequests.name: The Three Bells
sidequests.description: Recover the Red Bell (3rd Stratum), the Blue Bell (Azure Cave) and the Yellow Bell (5th stratum) and return to the Sea Temple.

sidequests.name: My Parting Gift...
sidequests.description: Search for the weird Blaziken in the Eighth Stratum.
